command: echo "=== OpenClaw Status ===" && which openclaw 2>/dev/null && openclaw status 2>&1 | head -40
ls -la ~/.openclaw/state 2>/dev/null || echo "No state dir"; ls -la ~/.openclaw/ 2>/dev/null | head -30
echo "=== Installed CLIs ===" && which node npm npx python3 curl wget git jq trash 2>/dev/null; echo "=== System ===" && uname -a && echo "=== PATH ===" && echo $PATH | tr ':' '\n'

echo "=== OpenClaw bin ===" && ls ~/.openclaw/bin/ 2>/dev/null && echo "=== Extensions ===" && ls ~/.openclaw/extensions/ 2>/dev/null && echo "=== Hooks ===" && ls ~/.openclaw/hooks/ 2>/dev/null && echo "=== Devices ===" && ls ~/.openclaw/devices/ 2>/dev/null
